---
title: "Categories"
---

This dataset contains **50,000** items organized into **22** categories.

### orthopedic
*23,269 items total*

- [Razek Surgical Instruments](razek-surgical-instruments.qmd) (3,417 items)
- [Bone Drills & Screws](bone-drills-screws.qmd) (3,259 items)
- [Surgical instrumentation & implants](surgical-instrumentation-implants.qmd) (3,050 items)
- [Orthopedic Surgical Accessories](orthopedic-surgical-accessories.qmd) (2,996 items)
- [Surgical instruments & consumables](surgical-instruments-consumables.qmd) (2,948 items)
- [General Surgical Supplies](general-surgical-supplies.qmd) (2,931 items)
- [Spine Surgical Instruments](spine-surgical-instruments.qmd) (2,557 items)
- [Cannulated surgical instruments](cannulated-surgical-instruments.qmd) (2,111 items)

### sizing + final product
*13,143 items total*

- [Polyaxial Cannulated Pedicle Screws](polyaxial-cannulated-pedicle-screws.qmd) (5,997 items)
- [Orthopedic Instruments & Implants](orthopedic-instruments-implants.qmd) (3,152 items)
- [Spinal Interbody Cages](spinal-interbody-cages.qmd) (2,898 items)
- [Polyaxial Cannulated Trial Plates](polyaxial-cannulated-trial-plates.qmd) (1,096 items)

### dental
*7,905 items total*

- [Dental surgical implant tools](dental-surgical-implant-tools.qmd) (3,927 items)
- [Orthodontic Bands & Wires](orthodontic-bands-wires.qmd) (2,334 items)
- [Implant system accessories](implant-system-accessories.qmd) (1,644 items)

### supplier brands
*2,624 items total*

- [Medline Surgical Supplies](medline-surgical-supplies.qmd) (1,568 items)
- [Cardinal Health surgical packs](cardinal-health-surgical-packs.qmd) (833 items)
- [Custom Perfusion Pack Sets](custom-perfusion-pack-sets.qmd) (223 items)

### lower extremity + compression
*1,550 items total*

- [Lower limb compression support](lower-limb-compression-support.qmd) (1,077 items)
- [Ankle‑Foot Orthoses (AFO)](anklefoot-orthoses-afo.qmd) (473 items)

### sensory/protective
*1,509 items total*

- [Hearing Aid & Ear Instruments](hearing-aid-ear-instruments.qmd) (1,109 items)
- [Eye Protection & Accessories](eye-protection-accessories.qmd) (400 items)
